System Management

Speed Control
2x Speed

Beginner's Guide

1. Basic Gameplay

In the game, you need to manage a cinema, generating revenue through shop management, purchasing, scheduling, etc., and gradually expanding the scale.

2. Shop Management

- You can open shops of different levels: Convenience Store, Premium Store, Flagship Store, Super Store

- Each shop level corresponds to different number of halls and capacity

3. Purchase Management

- Regularly purchase products such as popcorn, cola, merchandise, etc.

- Maintain appropriate inventory levels to avoid stockouts affecting revenue

4. Schedule Management

- Reasonably allocate the schedule proportion of different tier movies

- Regularly update the schedule to adapt to market demand

5. Promotion Activities

- Carry out promotional activities to increase cinema popularity

- Different promotion methods have different effects, choose the appropriate method according to the budget

6. Equipment Management

- Regularly maintain and update equipment to ensure the viewing experience

- Equipment aging will affect customer satisfaction, replace in time

7. Staff Management

- Staff level affects service quality and operating costs

8. Fund Management

- Reasonably plan funds, balance expansion and operation

- Pay attention to monthly expenses and revenue to avoid capital chain rupture

9. Save System

- Regularly save to prevent data loss

10. Game Objectives

- Continuously improve cinema brand value and market share

- Create higher box office and concessions revenue
